auth.accessDeniedDescription: Your account access has been restricted. Please contact our support team for more information.
auth.demoAccounts: Demo roles: use `admin-demo@example.com` for admin, `manager-demo@example.com` for manager, or `demo@example.com` for user. Any password with 6+ characters works in demo mode.
auth.loginDescription: Enter your credentials to access your account.
auth.signupDescription: Fill in your details to create an account.
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email address and we will send you a reset link if the account exists.
auth.needHelpDescription: If you believe this is an error, please reach out to our support team for assistance.
auth.pendingApprovalBody: Your account is currently under review. You will be notified once your access is approved by our team.
auth.resetPasswordSuccess: If the account exists, a reset link has been prepared. Please check your email inbox.
whatHappensNextItems: Our team is reviewing your application
You will receive an email once approved

chat.title: Chat
chat.emptyDescription: Open a support thread to start the conversation.
chat.supportReadyDescription: A general support thread is now available.
chat.chatNotCreatedDescription: The support thread could not be opened.
chat.closeFailedDescription: The thread could not be closed.
chat.recordingUnavailableDescription: The microphone could not be started.
chat.recording: Recording... tap again to send the voice note.
chat.messageFailedDescription: The message could not be sent.

offline.changesWillSync: Changes will sync when you reconnect
offline.queuedDescription: The action was queued and will sync automatically when you reconnect.

dashboard.staffTitle: Keep approvals, reservations, and inventory moving.
dashboard.userTitle: Track every vehicle, conversation, and request from one calm workspace.
dashboard.staffDescription: The dashboard surfaces the next queues that need action instead of burying operations under generic KPI cards.
dashboard.userDescription: Browse inventory, follow up with staff, and see the latest progress across your active requests.

inventory.availableDescription: Browse the latest approved inventory. Pricing stays hidden from normal users until staff shares it during follow-up.
inventory.reservedDescription: Reserved listings stay visible so buyers can stay informed, ask questions, and join the waitlist when interest stays high.
inventory.soldDescription: Sold vehicles remain visible as showcase inventory and can still receive inquiries or resale requests.
inventory.followUpPrompt: Please share the next available follow-up slot.
inventory.reservationPrompt: Interested in the next available step.
inventory.inquirySentDescription: The inquiry is now in the staff follow-up queue.
inventory.requestCapturedDescription: Your reserve-interest or waitlist request has been recorded.
inventory.resaleSentDescription: The resale request is now visible to staff.
inventory.actionFailedDescription: The request could not be completed.
inventory.searchPlaceholder: Search vehicles by make or model
inventory.vehiclesFound: {count, plural, =0 {No vehicles found} one {# vehicle found} other {# vehicles found}}
inventory.noVehicles: No vehicles match your current filters.
inventory.savedDescription: {vehicle} was added to your saved list.
inventory.removedDescription: {vehicle} was removed from your saved list.
inventory.linkCopiedDescription: Vehicle link copied to your clipboard.
inventory.vehicleStoryFallback: Highlights will appear here once the listing is enriched by staff.
inventory.conditionFallback: Condition notes will appear here once they are added to the listing.

profile.label: Profile
profile.title: Account settings
profile.description: Keep your contact details current, control the app language, and review the access level attached to this account.
profile.updatedDescription: Your profile and language preference were saved.
profile.saveFailedDescription: The profile could not be updated.
profile.accessDescription: Language changes are saved to your account and applied across the app. Sign out if you need to switch accounts.

settings.title: Control staff access and defaults
settings.description: Adjust the operational defaults for the workspace, including manager financial visibility and staff notifications.
settings.managerFinancialAccessDescription: Allow managers to view hidden vehicle financials.
settings.inquiryNotificationsDescription: Show staff alerts for new inquiries.
settings.reservationNotificationsDescription: Show alerts when reserve-interest and waitlist activity changes.
settings.sellerSubmissionNotificationsDescription: Show alerts for new seller submissions.
settings.resaleNotificationsDescription: Show alerts for new resale requests.
settings.chatNotificationsDescription: Show alerts for unread chat activity.
settings.localizationDescription: The default language is used for new demo signups. Existing users can still override language from their profile.
settings.updatedDescription: Admin controls and defaults were saved.
settings.saveFailedDescription: The settings could not be updated.

mediaUpload.title: Photos
mediaUpload.selectedCount: {count, plural, one {# photo selected} other {# photos selected}}
mediaUpload.dropzoneTitle: Add vehicle photos from camera or gallery
mediaUpload.dropzoneDescription: Images are resized to a maximum edge of 1600px and converted to WebP before they are saved.
mediaUpload.preparedDescription: Images were compressed before upload to reduce storage usage.

vehicleForm.createDescription: Capture the essentials first, then enrich the listing with notes, media, and hidden financials.
vehicleForm.editDescription: Update the live inventory record with cleaner mobile sections and faster picker inputs.
vehicleForm.basicsDescription: Choose the listing state, make, model, and the details a buyer will notice first.
vehicleForm.specsDescription: Keep the operational data clean so inventory, search, and pricing conversations stay accurate.
vehicleForm.notesDescription: Add the short summary, condition notes, and staff-only context for follow-up.
vehicleForm.mediaDescription: Front-load the most useful images so staff can publish quickly from mobile.
vehicleForm.financialDescription: These values stay on the staff side and do not appear to regular users.
vehicleForm.missingRequiredDescription: Make, model, and year are required before the listing can be saved.
vehicleForm.saveFailedDescription: The vehicle could not be saved.
vehicleForm.createdDescription: The listing was saved and added to the vehicle management queue.
vehicleForm.updatedDescription: The listing changes were saved successfully.
vehicleForm.noModels: No models found for this make
vehicleForm.noVariants: No variants found for this model

submissionForm.description: Keep seller contact details, vehicle basics, and photos in one clean mobile flow.
submissionForm.contactDescription: Capture the details staff will use to call back or request more information.
submissionForm.vehicleDescription: Share the basic vehicle details and the expected ask.
submissionForm.notesDescription: Explain the vehicle condition, recent work, and anything that should help triage the upload.
submissionForm.mediaDescription: Add clear images so staff can review the upload without asking again.
submissionForm.missingRequiredDescription: Seller name, phone, make, model, and notes are required.
submissionForm.invalidYearDescription: Use a realistic vehicle year before saving this upload.
submissionForm.noModels: No models found for this make
submissionForm.noVariants: No variants found for this model

submissions.title: My uploads
submissions.description: Track seller uploads, continue drafts that need changes, and open any linked live listing.
submissions.createdDescription: Your vehicle was added to the seller intake queue.
submissions.updatedDescription: Your vehicle submission is back in the review queue.
submissions.saveFailedDescription: The upload could not be saved.
submissions.deleteFailedDescription: The upload could not be removed.

sellerQueue.title: Seller submissions
sellerQueue.description: Review incoming seller uploads, request changes, and turn approved intake records into staff-managed listings.
sellerQueue.listingCreatedDescription: The submission is now a staff-managed draft listing.
sellerQueue.updatedDescription: The seller intake record was updated.
sellerQueue.reviewedDescription: The intake record was marked reviewed.
sellerQueue.changesRequestedDescription: The seller has been flagged for an updated submission.
sellerQueue.updateFailedDescription: The submission could not be updated.
